scripts.start: watchman watch-del-all && WITH_ROZENITE=true EXPO_NO_DOTENV=1 npx expo start --dev-client --reset-cache --port 8081
scripts.build-ios-dev: EXPO_APPLE_TEAM_ID=X5JL4763MG bun x expo prebuild --platform ios --clean && APP_ENV=development npx expo run:ios --configuration Debug
scripts.build-android-dev: bun x expo prebuild --platform android --clean && APP_ENV=development npx expo run:android
